name: Chinese: Chicken Chunks with Peanuts in Spicy
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts at room temperature
4 Green onions, trimmed and cut into 1-inch sections
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all sauce ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Reserve the sauce for later use.
3. Pull the skin off the chicken breasts and remove the meat from the bones. Slice the meat into 1-inch strips, then cut crosswise to make 1-inch chunks.
4. In a large bowl, combine egg white with water chestnut flour. Beat the mixture with a single chopstick (not an egg beater or whisk). Stir in the chicken pieces until thoroughly coated.
5. Marinate for 5 minutes.
6. Heat cooking oil in a wok or deep fryer to medium heat. Fry peanuts until they are a light tan color. Remove the peanuts with a strainer or slotted spoon and drain on paper towel or paper bag.
7. Turn up the heat slightly for the chicken. Test a chunk first; it should rise to the surface immediately and brown in about 2 minutes. Deep fry the coated chicken chunks until golden brown, frying no more than 8 pieces at a time. Use long chopsticks or a spatula to keep the pieces separate while frying. Remove with long chopsticks or a slotted spoon.
8. While frying the chicken, heat the sauce to simmer. Add green onions and peanuts about a minute before serving. At the last minute, add the chicken pieces to the sauce, mix quickly, and serve.
